hero.description: Custom-built, fast and unmistakable – for businesses that want more than mediocrity.

mission.label: Why Generics Studio
mission.title: Your website that sells. Not just exists.
mission.description: Most websites lose potential customers every day — through poor structure, generic design and lack of clarity.

benefits.title: More enquiries
benefits.description: Designs that build trust and move visitors to act — not just look.

benefits.title: Faster to launch
benefits.description: First prototypes in days. No endless back and forth, no waiting for approvals.

benefits.title: No templates
benefits.description: 100% individually developed. Your presence looks like no other — because it isn't.

benefits.title: Direct communication
benefits.description: You talk to the makers, not a project manager. Short channels, clear answers.

benefits.title: Built to last
benefits.description: Timeless designs without an expiry date. No redesign after two years.

benefits.title: Measurable impact
benefits.description: Structure, hierarchy and conversion logic are built in from the start — not added later.

items.title: Web Design
items.description: Built individually. Fast loading. Ready immediately.

items.title: Branding & Logos
items.description: Your name. Your colours. Your identity.

process.label: Process
process.title:
Three steps.
One result.
process.description: No chaos. No waiting. From idea to launch — clear and direct.

steps.title: Discover & Define

steps.title: Design & Development
steps.description: Early prototypes. Quick feedback. Every decision with intent.

steps.title: Launch & Support
